components.badges: font-mono text-xs px-2 py-1 border rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wider
components.input_area: bg-white border border-zinc-300 rounded-sm shadow-sm p-4 relative

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Chivo for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text. All model names and technical metadata must use IBM Plex Mono. Implement a high-contrast, technical 'Swiss' aesthetic with stark borders and minimal shadows. Ensure the sidebar has a solid right border (border-zinc-300). Input area should support drag-and-drop or a file upload button. Display AI verification status using badges (e.g., 'VERIFIED' in green/blue or 'UNCERTAIN' in yellow).
